## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run smoke`
- [ ] `npm run package:smoke` (when distribution/runtime paths change)
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Generator and evaluator remain independent.
- [ ] New write behavior has explicit human gates.
- [ ] New adapter behavior is backed by protocol or validator checks.
- [ ] Skill behavior changes include updated fresh-session eval evidence.
